hero.thesis: Leverage Amazon's massive distribution network to sell private-label products with a focus on high-demand, low-competition niches.
hero.marketSize: $469 billion in 2021, projected to grow by 10% annually.
hero.payingEvidence: Thousands of sellers on Amazon generate $10,000+ in monthly sales according to Jungle Scout.

ninetyDay.title: Validate and Select Your Product Niche

actions.action: Use Jungle Scout to identify 10 potential product niches with low competition and high demand.
Evaluate profitability with AMZScout's FBA calculator for each product.
Join the 'Private Label Profit' Reddit sub to research competitor strategies.

ninetyDay.metric: 3 validated product niches with potential 18% net margins.

ninetyDay.title: Source Your Product

actions.action: Contact 5 manufacturers on Alibaba for quotes and samples.
Evaluate sample quality and review manufacturer terms with Lovable.
Negotiate pricing and order terms for an initial batch of 100-200 units.

ninetyDay.metric: Manufacturer selected and initial batch ordered.

ninetyDay.title: Set Up Your Amazon Seller Account

actions.action: Register for an Amazon Seller Central account.
List your product with optimized titles and descriptions using Helium 10.
Set competitive pricing using Keepa for market trends.
Run a small PPC campaign using Amazon Ads to boost visibility.
Analyze ad performance and adjust keywords using Sellics.
Monitor reviews and customer feedback on Amazon.
actions.success: Improved product listing based on feedback.

actions.action: Send follow-up emails to first 10 customers using ConvertKit.
Offer a small discount for reviews or referrals via Stan Store.
Host a giveaway on Instagram targeting niche communities.
Review inventory turnover rates with Notion for restocking timelines.
Run a pricing A/B test using Amazon's pricing tools.
Join 'FBA Mastery' Discord server for advanced strategies.
Create an Amazon Storefront to showcase your brand.
Launch a social media ad campaign on Facebook targeting your niche audience.
Collaborate with micro-influencers on YouTube for product reviews.
Automate inventory tracking with n8n.
Streamline order fulfillment processes using Amazon's FBA tools.
Audit all expenses and negotiate with suppliers for better rates.
Implement a loyalty program using ConvertKit to increase repeat purchases.
Analyze customer feedback for product improvement insights.
Run a limited-time offer to drive urgency and sales.
Review monthly sales and profit margins using Notion dashboard.
Adjust pricing and marketing strategy based on sales data.
Prepare a financial forecast for the next quarter.

ninetyDay.title: Expand Product Line

actions.action: Research and select an additional product to complement your current offering.
Contact suppliers and negotiate terms for the new product.
List new product on Amazon and optimize with Helium 10.

ninetyDay.metric: New product listed with initial sales.

ninetyDay.title: Solidify Brand Presence

actions.action: Develop a brand story and update your Amazon Storefront.
Engage with community forums like 'Amazon FBA Hub' to share insights and build authority.
Evaluate overall business performance and set new KPIs for growth.

ninetyDay.metric: 30% increase in brand recognition and customer engagement.

toolStack.name: Jungle Scout
toolStack.why: For product research and market analysis to find high-demand, low-competition products.

toolStack.name: AMZScout
toolStack.why: To calculate FBA fees and profit margins for potential products.

toolStack.name: Helium 10
toolStack.why: For optimizing Amazon product listings and keyword research.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: To automate customer engagement emails and manage subscriber lists.

toolStack.name: Stan Store
toolStack.why: To offer discounts and manage customer promotions seamlessly.
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, paid plans start at $29/month.

toolStack.name: n8n
toolStack.why: To automate inventory tracking and streamline operations.
toolStack.pricing: Free for self-hosted, cloud starts at $20/month.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: For managing tasks, tracking inventory, and analyzing financial performance.
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, paid plans start at $8/month.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Subject: [Niche] Product You Need to Know

Hi [Name],

I noticed your interest in [Niche] products and thought you’d love our new launch. We’re offering an exclusive discount to our first customers. Check it out here: [Link].

Thanks,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Send initial message, follow up after 3 days, final reminder after 7 days.

pricing.growth: $20-$30 per unit with added features or bundle
pricing.premium: $30+ per unit for high-end versions or exclusive bundles
pricing.raisingRules: Raise prices by 10% after securing 50+ reviews and consistent sales.

failureModes: Overestimating demand leading to unsold inventory.
Inadequate product differentiation causing low sales.
Ignoring customer feedback leading to poor reviews.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas for LLC setup and banking, cost $500.
setup.payments: Set up Amazon Payments for seamless transactions.
setup.contracts: Use Lovable to draft manufacturer contracts, ensuring quality and terms are clear.
setup.insurance: Get product liability insurance through Hiscox; starts at $30/month.

scaling: Once you've mastered the basics and achieved consistent MRR, consider scaling by outsourcing repetitive tasks. Hire a virtual assistant via platforms like Upwork to manage customer service and inventory tracking, freeing up your time to focus on strategy and growth. As sales grow, invest in expanding your product line. Use customer feedback to inform new product development, ensuring alignment with market demand. Consider forming partnerships with other brands to leverage their customer base and expand your reach. Finally, reinvest profits into marketing and R&D to maintain growth momentum and stay competitive in the marketplace.
